title: 无标题文章
summary: Jake and Jesse were my CN Tower. I only worked with them occasionally, but I always felt reassured just knowing they were around if I needed help. I'm mad our company lost both of them in the same week, and I'm afraid the entire Android OSS community is going to feel the ripple effect in the days to come.
content: Jake and Jesse were my CN Tower. I only worked with them occasionally, but I always felt reassured just knowing they were around if I needed help. I'm mad our company lost both of them in the same week, and I'm afraid the entire Android OSS community is going to feel the ripple effect in the days to come.
